title: Scrumbles Krunchies Cat Treats Turkey Christmas 60g
features: Crunchy outside, soft pillow middle – pure festive magic
Packed with chicken to charm even the fussiest felines
Added pumpkin for a happy tum-tum
No sugar, no salt, no nasties – ever
100% recyclable packaging & resealable for ultimate freshness
Suitable for all cats aged 8 weeks and up
description: Product Description Treat your kitty to a festive snack-attack with our limited-edition Krunchies Christmas Cat Treats! These tasty little pillows are packed with chicken, and have a purr-fectly crispy outside with a soft centre that cats can't get enough of. Whether they’ve been naughty or nice, you can feel good spoiling them, no sugar, salt, or artificial nasties here. Ingredients Dried chicken 20%, rice flour*, pea starch, coconut oil*, potato protein, poultry fat, 4% turkey, vegetable fibre, hydrolyzed chicken proteins (2%), dried brewer’s yeasts*, hydrolyzed chicken liver , dried cranberries (0.5%), minerals. Directions Keep in a cool dry place. See more
